ground_truth.description: Photo in Prague, architecture very typical. Powder Tower visible in background (might be hard to identify). Should at least recognize European city.
ground_truth.photographer_description: This photo is taken in Prague, and the architecture is very typical of Prague. Also in the background you can see the Powder Tower, which might be hard to get. It should at least recognize a European city based on the architecture. Daytime, snowing, cloudy.

details.description: A winter street scene in Prague with light snowfall. The view looks along a cobbled street toward a dark Gothic gate tower with a steep slate roof, pinnacles, and a pointed arch passage—clearly the Powder Tower. On the left is an ornate pale-beige Art Nouveau facade with sculptural reliefs and a glazed corner cupola, part of the Municipal House complex. On the right is another curved Art Nouveau facade with green metal balconies and decorative friezes above the windows. Pedestrians cross the wet street and cars are parked along the sides; blue parking signs are visible. The lighting is overcast, emphasizing the contrast between the dark stone tower and the lighter stucco buildings around Republic Square.

details.description: Snowy street scene in Prague's Old Town (Staré Město) showing a cobblestone avenue with pedestrians and parked cars. On the left is an ornate pale-beige building with sculptural details and a circular domed pavilion, suggesting a prominent Art Nouveau structure (likely Municipal House vicinity). In the center background rises the dark Gothic Powder Tower (Prašná brána) with a steep spire, a defining medieval landmark. To the right, a rounded corner building with decorative stonework and a green balcony adds to the historic streetscape. Light snowfall, damp pavement, and the composition indicate a view toward the Powder Tower, near Na Příkopě/Celetná areas, typical of Prague’s historic core.

details.description: Snow falls on a cobblestoned street in Prague’s Old Town. Pedestrians in winter coats cross between parked cars and shopfronts. The scene is framed by ornate light-beige Art Nouveau façades with rounded corners and a small dome on the left. Dominating the center background is a tall, dark stone Gothic tower with a steep roof, pinnacles, and an arched gateway passage—the historic city gate known as the Powder Tower. The adjacent curved Art Nouveau building on the left is part of the Municipal House complex.

entities.name: Powder Tower (Prašná brána)
entities.notes: Late Gothic city gate of Prague; foundation 1475; used to store gunpowder in the 17th century; extensively restored in Neo‑Gothic style by Josef Mocker (1875–1886); approx. 65 m tall; marks the start of the Royal Route.

entities.name: Municipal House (Obecní dům)
entities.notes: Major Art Nouveau civic building adjoining the Powder Tower; built 1905–1912 by Antonín Balšánek and Osvald Polívka; home to Smetana Hall and notable decorative art.

entities.name: Gothic architecture
entities.notes: Expressed by the dark stone tower with pointed roof, tracery, and pinnacles (late Gothic with Neo‑Gothic restoration).

entities.name: Art Nouveau
entities.notes: Seen in the curving façades, ornate reliefs, and domed corner of the Municipal House and nearby buildings.

entities.notes: Square where the Powder Tower and Municipal House stand, at the edge of Prague’s Old Town.

entities.notes: Historic central district encompassing the scene.

details.description: A snowy daytime street scene in Prague's historic center. The street is lined with ornate cream-colored buildings featuring rounded corners and decorative details. A dark Gothic tower rises in the distance between the buildings, flanked by small spires, creating a dramatic skyline. Pedestrians walk along the cobbled, wet street while parked cars line the sides. Snowflakes drift through a grey sky above the urban landscape.

entities.name: Powder Tower
entities.notes: Gothic tower visible in the distance, a prominent Prague landmark.

details.description: A street-level view of a wet, cobblestone street in Prague during a light snowfall. The scene is dominated by three major architectural landmarks. In the center background stands the dark, Gothic Powder Tower (Prašná brána) with its high slate roof and corner turrets. Framing the view on the left is the ornate Art Nouveau facade of the Municipal House (Obecní dům), featuring a corner dome with gold detailing, statues in niches, and large windows. On the right stands the Hotel Paris (Hotel Paříž), another grand Art Nouveau building with a beige facade, a rounded corner, and distinctive green balconies. Pedestrians in winter clothing are walking along the street, and several cars are driving or parked on the wet pavement.

details.description: A street-level view in Prague during a light snowfall, looking towards the historic Powder Tower. To the left is the ornate, Art Nouveau-style Municipal House with its distinctive dome and sculptural details. The street is paved with wet cobblestones, reflecting the overcast sky. Pedestrians in winter clothing are crossing the street, and several cars are parked or moving through the intersection. On the right, a curved building with large glass storefronts and Art Nouveau architectural elements frames the scene. The atmosphere is wintry and urban, capturing a classic view of Prague's Old Town architecture.

details.description: Snowy street scene in Prague showing a dark, late‑Gothic city gate tower with a steep pyramidal roof and corner turrets (the Powder Tower) framed by ornate cream‑colored Art Nouveau buildings. At left/foreground is the curving façade and domed corner of the Municipal House with rich stucco decoration and wrought‑iron canopies over shop entrances. Cobblestone pavement, parked cars, and pedestrians are visible under an overcast sky.

details.description: A snow-filled Central European street scene featuring ornate historic architecture. In the foreground on the left is a rounded, light-colored building with rich stone reliefs, arched windows, and a domed corner turret, showcasing late 19th/early 20th-century decorative style. Across the street are more elaborately carved façades and shopfronts. In the distance, a tall dark Gothic-style tower or spire rises behind a stone barrier, suggesting a city center with historic gates or churches. Pedestrians in winter coats walk along the wet, snow-dusted cobblestones while several cars are parked along the curb. Light is diffuse due to overcast sky and snowfall.

details.description: Snowy street scene in a historic European city. A dark, late‑Gothic stone gate tower with a steep pyramidal roof and corner turrets stands centered down the street; a roadway passes through its arch. At the left foreground is a large cream‑colored Art Nouveau civic building with rounded corner pavilions, bay windows, ornate sculptural decoration, and green copper domes and canopies. Pedestrians walk on wet cobblestones among parked cars, while light snow falls under a grey sky. The photo appears taken from inside a vehicle, with part of the hood or dashboard visible at lower right.

details.description: A wintry urban street scene in a European city featuring ornate historic architecture. In the foreground, a large beige stone building with a curved corner and decorative details, topped by a glass dome. The street is busy with parked cars and pedestrians in winter coats; snow is falling and accumulating on the cobblestones. In the distance, a dark, crenellated Gothic-style tower rises behind a stone wall, suggesting a historic core of the city.

details.description: A vertically oriented photograph (rotated 90 degrees clockwise relative to upright) capturing a snowy winter street scene in Prague, Czech Republic. The view looks down the street U Obecního domu towards the historic center. In the background stands the dark, Gothic Powder Tower (Prašná brána) with its characteristic slate roof and spires. Flanking the street are two magnificent Art Nouveau buildings: on one side (top in image orientation, right if upright) is the Municipal House (Obecní dům), identifiable by its cream facade, decorative stucco, and greenish metal balcony railings; on the opposite side (bottom in image orientation, left if upright) is the Hotel Paris Prague (Hotel Paříž), distinguished by its prominent corner tower with a gold-accented spire and statues. The street is wet and slushy with falling snow, and cars are parked along the curb while pedestrians walk with umbrellas.

details.description: A street-level view in Prague during a snowfall, looking down the street U Prašné brány towards the Gothic Powder Tower. The image is oriented vertically (rotated 90 degrees counter-clockwise). On the left side of the street (bottom of the image) is the Municipal House (Obecní dům), a prominent Art Nouveau building featuring a large dome, intricate stone carvings, and statues. On the right side (top of the image) is another ornate building with Art Nouveau details and a green-roofed corner bay window. The street is paved with cobblestones, wet from the snow, and lined with parked cars and pedestrians. The sky is a flat, overcast grey with visible snowflakes falling throughout the scene.
